stemHtml: The aircraft's tanks have a capacity of 868 kg. The basic mission fuel consumption for an aircraft with the pilot only is 200 kg/h with 400 kg of fuel on board. The pilot has to deliver a parcel of 300 kg. The effect on fuel burn for an increased weight is 10 kg / 100 kg of additional weight. Additionally, due to poor weather expected along the way the pilot decides to take an extra fuel of 45 min. What is the take off fuel required for this flight?
